tasks.label: Publish: Alpha → Beta (develop → staging)
tasks.command: git checkout staging && git merge develop && git push origin staging && git checkout develop && echo Done: develop merged into staging and pushed.

tasks.label: Publish: Beta → Production (staging → main)
tasks.command: git checkout main || (echo FAIL: could not checkout main.& exit /b 1) && git -c core.editor=true merge --no-ff --no-edit staging || (echo FAIL: merge staging into main failed.& git merge --abort >nul 2>nul & exit /b 1) && git push origin main || (echo FAIL: push to origin/main failed.& exit /b 1) && git checkout develop || (echo FAIL: merged and pushed, but could not checkout develop.& exit /b 1) && echo Done: staging merged into main and pushed.
